description: CompositionWhite boat neck top made of 100% cotton, has short adjustable sleeves, metal stud detailing and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this luxe top with its plush fabric. Style this soft piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a tonal shrug or jacket.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
